calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: K. Shaw, CSR: Vicki Gross.

Petitioner: Josephine Mattos, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jerimiah BJ Parker, was sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the Order dispensing with notice to the minor's father.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Jerimiah Mattos.

Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-20-2006 Reset To May-04-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Petitioner: Josephine Mattos, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jerimiah Parker, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent and no proof of service of notice, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to May 4, 2006 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to submit proof of service to the Minor's father of the new hearing date or filing of the declaration and Application for an Order dispensing notice.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
